Package creational

Class SingletonStore

java.lang.Object
creational.SingletonStore
public class SingletonStore extends Object
The SingletonStore class represents a store that uses the Singleton design pattern to ensure only one instance of the store exists throughout the application.

This class provides methods to add, retrieve, display, and update products in the store.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addProduct(models.Product product)
    Adds a single product to the store.
    void
    addProducts(List<models.Product> newProducts)
    Adds multiple products to the store.
    void
    displayProducts()
    Displays all products in the store.

    Retrieves the single instance of the SingletonStore.
    List<models.Product>
    getProducts()
    Retrieves the list of all products in the store.
    void
    updateProduct(models.Product updatedProduct)
    Updates an existing product in the store or adds it if it doesn't exist.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static SingletonStore getInstance()
      Retrieves the single instance of the SingletonStore.

      If the instance does not exist, it is created.

      Returns:
      The single instance of the SingletonStore.

    • addProduct

      public void addProduct(models.Product product)
      Adds a single product to the store.
      Parameters:
      product - The product to be added.

    • addProducts

      public void addProducts(List<models.Product> newProducts)
      Adds multiple products to the store.
      Parameters:
      newProducts - A list of products to be added.

    • getProducts

      public List<models.Product> getProducts()
      Retrieves the list of all products in the store.
      Returns:
      A list of all Product objects in the store.

    • displayProducts

      public void displayProducts()
      Displays all products in the store.

      If no products are available, a message is displayed indicating that the store is empty. Otherwise, it prints the details of each product.

    • updateProduct

      public void updateProduct(models.Product updatedProduct)
      Updates an existing product in the store or adds it if it doesn't exist.

      This method checks if a product with the same name already exists in the store. If it exists, the product is updated. Otherwise, the new product is added to the store.

      Parameters:
      updatedProduct - The updated product to be added or updated in the store.
